case_title: VICENTE L. LALISAN VS. HSI YUN MA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-12-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LALISAN, VICENTE L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MA, HSI YUN $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MA, HSI YUN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LALISAN, VICENTE L. AS TO DEFENDANT MA, HSI YUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-30-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF VICENTE L. LALISAN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT HSI YUN MA. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF VICENTE L. LALISAN & DEFENDANT HSI YUN MA. VIVIAN WONG WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS MANDARIN SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS UNTIMELY, BUT DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. DEFENDANT REQUESTED THAT THE MATTER BE REFERED TO MEDIATION, BUT PLAINTIFF WAS UNWILLING TO ATTEND MEDIATION. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MA, HSI YUN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE LISTED SERVED AUG-12-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MA, HSI YUN
ANSWER TO REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LALISAN, VICENTE L.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT
